quote.msg:
老老實實
英文差好唔好reading做難啲果份搏下大帽?

replies.msg: 唔好

.
起床第一件事，聽30分鐘英文新聞/廣播，讓自己重新適應英文的語感，方開始溫習。
第二件事，請重新檢查中六全年作文卷的錯處，重新掌握英文科要求，以及當作重溫熱門題目。
第三件事，選取兩道題目，盡可能不曾預備過的，一道可取較容易、貼身、常見的題目，另一道取較難、議題不熟悉，但到考試時作最後選擇的題目，然後準備兩題大綱，包括相關例子，藉此訓練思考能力。
第四件事，檢視（或重做）2016及2017年卷一，此兩年尤關重要，原因不多作解釋，檢視自己錯處，尤其考核文法水平的題目，然後牢記造成相關錯誤的原因。
第五件事，重溫各項文法，確保文法概念清晰。有任何疑難，可即時透過Instagram/Facebook/討論區發問，我們會盡力協助。
第六件事，重溫已記住的詞彙，讓自己熟悉明天的可選字詞，每個詞語需配以兩個近義詞，以作交替使用。
第七件事，2200，同樣在@awenglishls，最後提示大家常犯錯誤及幫大家打打氣。
.
卷一方面
.
不論Part A、Part B1或Part B2，每部分佔分約40-48不等。
能力穩定達Level 4或以上同學可選B2，35分鐘完成A，45分鐘完成B2，10分鐘拾遺。
能力未穩定達至Level 3同季，請選B1，以50分鐘完成A，35分鐘完成B，5分鐘拾遺
能力介乎Level 3 - Level 4同學應視乎文章深淺度抉擇。
.
16年起考評局刻意選取相同主題(theme)的文章，於B1及B2分別考核，同學如對主題存疑，可scan & skim另一文章，以了解主題意思。
.
文章體裁(Text-type)十分極度非常重要，閱讀任何東西前，必須先了解Text-type。因為不同文體會影響文章表述的Fact vs Opinion，從而影響某部分題目的答案。
.
T/F/NG題目請務必考慮清楚可能性。有可能發生（亦即有矛盾）則屬NG，反之則屬F。沒有所謂1T1F1NG的答案分配，切勿自我蒙蔽。
.
Reference題目答案通常於前方，偶爾亦可於後方出現。留意reference word的grammar restrictions。
.
Summary Cloze是最明顯考核grammar的題型，下筆前請三思，確保part of speech、tenses、plurality、meaning全對，方可答題。原則上，詞語未必來自文章，但大多數情況下可從文章找到字根，從而推敲答案所要求的word family member，否則，考核詞彙亦會是常見詞語之一。
.
Main idea / sub-heading 題目難處在於詞句扭曲，建議用小學雞的縮寫法，縮短篇章內容，以求main idea。
.
長題目留意subject及identifier，通常可以直接抄錄原文，無須paraphrase，除非特別指明。
.
問及rhetoric，如metaphor, simile, pun, irony，請以自己文字解釋答案。
.
題型難以一一盡錄，大家如有問題，可隨時聯絡我們。

卷二方面
.
200字短文佔40%，400字長文佔60%
課堂上已清楚解釋卷二須先擬稿之原因，並教授相關技巧、在此不再重覆。
5分鐘寫Part A大綱，30分鐘寫作Part A；然後5分鐘寫Part B大綱，70分鐘寫作Part B，剩餘約10分鐘覆核全卷，包括文法、語文運用、語氣等。
.
200字短文，考評局近年都特意配以寫作目的，並清楚列明文章內容要點，同學僅需論證/說明/記敘/描寫相關缺漏部分，加上例子，即為上品。素來我說
短文比長文難，因為精要往往比詳盡更具挑戰性。
.
英文作文題目要求通常由Write...開始，其後為內容要點，漏答會不合格。曾經有個別同學誤以為”Write an article proposing an activity...”即要求寫Proposal，此為不可容忍的錯，文體必定以名詞為標準。
.
請大家謹記必定要仔細審題。題目是王道，如何荒謬都必須緊扣。譬如去年要求考生寫信予校長講述一項活動，及僅講述該活動對老人院（非老人家）的好處，即使明知現實中此內容的信件實屬荒謬，但亦必須嚴格遵守，否則又如去年一樣，傷亡慘重，合格率再度急跌。
.
英文作文與中文綜合類同。傳統而言，”Write...”前的文字為語境意識部分，必須緊扣。同學必須就題目每一個字眼所關聯的特徵及論據，貫穿文章論證部分，方為上上品。
.
英文作文題目離不開三個主軸：teenagers(students), schools, Hong Kong
好好溫習
.
至於內容部分，活動類題目尤其與綜合見解論證部分相似，同學必須提出極為具體的詳情，方可取得較佳分數。其他題目如two-sided argumentative essay則類近通識，講求多角度思考及論證過程，引用例子（數據例子只要合乎常理，則不必為真實例子亦可）
.
內容第三個考核要點是identity及awareness of audience，故此同學在某些文體可行時必須強調個人身分及表現出對受眾合適的態度。理論上一般以平行身分或上行為主，禮多人不怪。
.
語文上，文法準確是Level 5基本，奪星則視乎用詞準確度（非難易度）、變化及formality為主。同學矢志奪星必須詳加考慮用詞的正式度，如Therefore v.s So。考評局十分欣賞同學多用肯定語氣的字眼去遊說及說服他人，因此可多用undoubtedly, firmly等等字眼。
.
結構上，為展示多元思考及條理，請以日常生活中絕不常見的突兀方式處理。每逢新論點，請以moreover, in addition, besides等字眼加以說明，又或以通識角度字眼如economically處理。
.
句子之間的連貫性並非必定靠關聯詞cohesive devices扣連。有同學不斷以不必要的因果性cohesive devices連結句子，反而削弱文章流暢度，影響結構得分。如重閱文章時發現文句之間有一定連繫，可刪走多餘的關聯詞。
.
不同文體的開首及結尾有所分別，但離不開背景（即考題出現原因）、目的、定義、大綱、立場；以及總結、歸納、期望、鼓勵等句子。
.
最後請謹記，英文以簡潔為核心，自古以來優雅文句詳於字詞，簡於文句。背誦「掗字數」及冗長句子只會落得下品分數。
.
稍後再詳談Paper 3
.

12 DSE Q.6 Cancelling PE Lessons (反對）

To start with, we must bear in mind that cancelling PE lessons produce a health risk to our students. Nowadays, dealing with tons of homework and tutorial classes, students may not have their free time to do sports. Lack of exercises will cause overweight, diabetes, or even fatal diseases like cancer. From this, we can notice that having enough exercises is essential to maintain a healthy life. No doubt, PE lessons is one way to give a chance to our students to get away from their seats and to have fun with sports. Having enough PE lessons can prevent them from suffering in overweight and other health problems, and it may even improve their immune system so that they are more resistant to bacteria. In light of this, it is self-evident that PE lessons should be kept.

Thank you

.2016 part AYou are the President of the Student Union at your school. You are preparing a speech to welcome new students on the first day of school. In order to help students achieve success and have an enjoyable school life, you want to talk about the following in your speech:
-importance of following school rules; and
-importance of interpersonal relationships.

第一段：

Obviously, one of the responsibilities which we students have to bear is to follow school rules . You may wonder that why we must follow the regulations provided by school . The rationale behind is that the school will be messy of there are no rule regulating students. Imagine if students can cheat in exams. It is no doubt that most students will do so so as to get high mark. However, is the exam fair? I guess most of you can understand now : regulations are used to maintain equality , to avoid the availability of conflicts among students. School rules are just the miniature of law. That’s why we have to follow school rules like following laws.

First of all, being an actress is my long cherished dream. Both of you would surely remember me as a timid girl who would never dare to leave from the hugs of mommy and daddy. I never had the guts to talk to strangers or even to express my feelings. However, my shy characteristic no longer existed when I joined the school's drama club. Being chosen to be the main character of the show, little red riding hood, I was already petrified even when I stood on the stage, not mentioning to read the dialogues loud and clear with emotions. Luckly, with help of my supportive classmates and teachers, I trained hard not only to step out of my comfort zone, but to use drama as a medium to express myself. At last, the show was a massive success, I have never been more proud of myself when I heard the cheering and clapping sound echoed around the hall, which was all for me. I knew both of you were proud of me too. Since then I dread to perform on stage, hoping everyone can appreciate and adore my act. An idea grew out of my mind since that I have to become an actress. I want to perform for everyone, not only at school events but in public, in front of everyone's eyes. Entering HKAPA is the best opportunity to turn my dream into reality, as the school provides numerous chance for me to perform and even a pathway for me to become an actress. As parents I'm sure that both of you would like to see their loving daughter being able to pursue her dream and to do something she likes. So I genuinely hope that my parents can also allow me to achieve my dreams, which is giving me a chance to apply in HKAPA.

其實係一個logic三步論
We have to follow the law.
School rules are miniature of the law.
Therefore, we have to follow school rules.

當然咁寫冇文采，所以只係for你thinking，你諗諗點present。
